parents.subject: LU-20007 lod: fix wrong proc entry cleared on spill error

commit.subject: LU-12105 tests: fix sanity/39 checks and style
commit.message:
LU-12105 tests: fix sanity/39 checks and style

Fix sanity test_39c and test_39l to account for minor skew between
kernel and userspace clocks.

Clean up code style on test_39a-39m.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Change-Id: I76f4ba4cce8542f31d0b158bd8fc3348f4300c1e
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64758
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
